## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run verify:auto-init`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Docs and config

- [ ] `README.md` updated if behaviour or setup changed
- [ ] `docs/` updated if operational or architectural expectations changed
- [ ] `env.example` updated if local setup changed
- [ ] `env.template` / `env.vercel.template` / `env.vps.template` updated if runtime config changed

## Risk notes

Call out anything security-sensitive, operationally risky, or difficult to roll back.
